text: This chapter shall be so interpreted and construed as to effectuate its general purpose to make uniform the laws of those states which enact it.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.420 — Uniformity of interpretation.

This chapter shall be so interpreted and construed as to effectuate its general purpose to make uniform the laws of those states which enact it.

subsections.text: This chapter shall be so interpreted and construed as to effectuate its general purpose to make uniform the laws of those states which enact it.
